description_long: This object is a vibrant cluster of pink lilies, each flower displaying six broad, pointed petals with a gradient from deep pink at the center to lighter pink and white at the edges. The petals are adorned with dark pink speckles and have a slightly ruffled texture, giving the flowers a lifelike appearance. Several unopened buds are visible, indicating different stages of bloom, and the flowers are supported by slender, green stems. The foliage consists of elongated, lanceolate leaves that are a rich green, providing a striking contrast to the colorful blossoms. The arrangement is naturalistic, with flowers radiating outward and overlapping, creating a lush, full bouquet. This type of floral arrangement is commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as decorative plantings along sidewalks and public spaces.
description: A lush bouquet of pink lilies with speckled petals, green stems, and lanceolate leaves, featuring both open blooms and buds. The flowers are arranged in a natural, outward-radiating cluster.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of several open pink lilies, with prominent speckled petals and visible green leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bouquet, with some flowers overlapping and buds more visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying mostly the backs of the flowers and more of the green stems and leaves, with buds clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing a mix of open blooms and buds, with petals overlapping and a dynamic arrangement of leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, with each flower displaying six overlapping petals that radiate symmetrically from the center. The petals are slightly layered, creating a full, star-like appearance typical of lilies.
